prs.title: feat(image): add Kitty Unicode placeholder protocol for tmux
prs.body:
## Summary

Fixes #41 — images fall back to half-blocks inside tmux+Ghostty because standard Kitty placement commands don't work through tmux.

- Adds `ImageProtocol::KittyUnicode` variant that uses the [Kitty Unicode placeholder method](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/graphics-protocol/#unicode-placeholders): image data is uploaded via DCS passthrough, and placement uses U+10EEEE placeholder characters with combining diacritics (row/col) and foreground color (image ID)
- Auto-detects tmux via `TMUX` env var, then probes for Kitty-capable outer terminal (`TERM_PROGRAM`, `TERM`, `KITTY_WINDOW_ID`, `KONSOLE_VERSION`)
- Can be forced with `MDTERM_IMAGE_PROTOCOL=kitty-unicode`
- Keeps existing direct Kitty path unchanged (more efficient outside tmux)

**Note:** Requires `set -g allow-passthrough on` in tmux config for DCS passthrough to work.

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo check` / `cargo clippy` — no warnings
- [x] `cargo test` — all 127 tests pass
- [x] Manual test in tmux+Ghostty: `MDTERM_IMAGE_PROTOCOL=kitty-unicode cargo run -- <file-with-images.md>`
- [x] Manual test outside tmux: verify auto-detection still picks `Kitty` for Ghostty/Kitty
- [x] Verify `MDTERM_IMAGE_PROTOCOL=kitty` still works as before (direct path unchanged)

prs.title: feat: add JSON file viewer with semantic rendering
prs.body:
## Summary

- Adds a new `json.rs` module that parses JSON files and renders them as structured tree views with Unicode box-drawing guides, color-coded types, and automatic table detection for arrays of homogeneous objects
- All existing viewer features (search, TOC, link picker, keyboard nav, auto-reload, multi-file switching, HTML export) work automatically for JSON files — no viewer logic changes needed beyond a render dispatch
- Adds 7 new JSON-specific theme colors (`json_key`, `json_string`, `json_number`, `json_bool`, `json_null`, `json_bracket`, `json_path`) to both dark and light themes

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo run -- test.json` — verify tree view renders with colored types, headings, and table for `dependencies`/`authors`
- [x] Press `o` — TOC shows top-level JSON keys as sections
- [x] Press `/` and search — highlights matches in JSON content
- [x] Press `f` — link picker finds URLs from JSON string values
- [x] `cargo run -- test.json README.md` and Tab — multi-file switching between JSON and markdown
- [x] `cargo run -- test.json --export html` — HTML export works
- [x] `cat test.json | cargo run -- --no-color` — piped output works (renders as markdown fallback for stdin)
- [x] `cargo test` — all 123 existing tests pass
- [x] `cargo clippy` — clean
